textByHashes.26c14a7ab1debaeaa99b85dd55f4dd520c00f207: I just need to finish this little job. I'll be with you in a minute. While you're waiting, why not talk to that fiery lass? She'll fill you in on the situation here.
textByHashes.4baacd5da7463bba80a18919ecdf6a64c0969cd0: Have you now laddie? I was wondering when they'd send someone.
textByHashes.fafc6b7947e3b6b40bf49d8de4f59ff6b613c966: Have you now lassie? I was wondering when they'd send someone.
textByHashes.cbe1c0f1db9ad643e8af323d558c4a6a103cfa57: They all kept saying that the Doors were failing and I kept telling them that was rubbish. Did they listen? Of course they didn't.
textByHashes.3eb814dedcc22a659e7f38c3264d18bf12792bca: Of course not! They were made by Dinh himself, the finest smith this world has ever seen. His work doesn't just fail!
textByHashes.fa6d7991b84ab4f9598cfcbc3f80055970789045: You're right with that one laddie. Someone or something has made a small hole in the Doors.
textByHashes.448c3a1afa29366cff6d06e84a3a5748c41a0797: You're right with that one lassie. Someone or something has made a small hole in the Doors.
textByHashes.e3a483d63ae0c72d47084b935beaff423d3e4a1e: It's not much, but it's enough for that Wintertodt to be able to draw some power into the prison. Probably why them fiery lot have had so much trouble recently.
textByHashes.f3fee2562fd08b4d77bd6029134cddc573fcfd40: Repair the damage of course laddie. Now I should be able to fix the issue no problem. The only thing I'm missing is the right tools. That's where you come in.
textByHashes.c007ae0b4f98b3598ed444cd6d08a8e1d85e6147: Repair the damage of course lassie. Now I should be able to fix the issue no problem. The only thing I'm missing is the right tools. That's where you come in.
textByHashes.b2953de5d76bdf1ab34e5fafe9f4f8b413769241: What does it look like I'm holding you spoon?! I don't just need any hammer. I need the legendary hammer used by Dinh himself! It's the only tool capable of working this metal.
textByHashes.0799894ab7ba7e96e7cafc364a96d8c496e26fc4: Back in his prime, Dinh built a great tower. It was known as Dinh's Redoubt and it's where he created all of his finest inventions.
textByHashes.bec79e51833ec62ceb4afc01d186ac536ed0447c: After Dinh died, some poncey mage thought they'd go and defile his tower. The place has been off limits ever since.
textByHashes.37cf0222c080b39315cbe9a794356e750848a5b0: Now I don't know for sure, but I reckon that Dinh's Hammer might still be there.
textByHashes.902a816126744d5c2f6c82de737ebbb67d6bd025: The Forsaken Tower, as it's now known, can be found west of Lovakengj.
textByHashes.c0d62168b8d0faea1b30ed02b407560ab32c9cbc: Have you got Dinh's Hammer yet laddie?
textByHashes.368f3fdc06cb1bc443c8503230d1e6c4d11c7cab: Have you got Dinh's Hammer yet lassie?
textByHashes.7719c9c536226939937c64a04fd8f62b822c52f1: I reckon it's somewhere in Dinh's Redoubt, or The Forsaken Tower, as it's now known. You'll find it west of Lovakengj.
textByHashes.f0a92be1a35359fad2adfdd02b0ac938a99755a9: Look at it! Such a work of art. Dinh never fails to impress. Now that I have this, it shouldn't take me long to fix the Doors.
textByHashes.d47e86642101649fc3691607b8662153ee4ba0f7: That should be the case in the long run. I suspect it will take a long time though. The Doors were damaged for a while and the Wintertodt will have gained a lot of power.
textByHashes.3d743e71956799c3bb297d9ef52a1a4523b3d2b5: I reckon that magic lot will have to do their fiery tricks for a bit longer before everything is back to normal.
textByHashes.30d4b4056bdc62859d4e573cbda0a709f4605914: Anyway, I'll get to work fixing the Doors. You should head back to Lady Lovakengj and let her know that the problem has been solved.
textByHashes.a6186b3f99469edb61e75f75a1bd1ee07f57f562: Why are you wasting my time?!
textByHashes.d9bab1c3480b7bd18fc39d53f86e11ee30129b75: Now that I have Dinh's Hammer, it shouldn't take me long to fix the Doors. You should head back to Lady Lovakengj and let her know.
textByHashes.443b2b88627aa867e8988eb7fb4640486eb2a69e: They say it's some kind of powerful fire spirit.
textByHashes.fd6fb38fbf38b1bb913146249ac87c28d912d6c6: What it is doesn't bother me, just as long as we keep it behind the Doors.
textByHashes.643ba697aad82b6d4abbd9fe7e26def443d2a1bc: The Doors were built by Dinh to contain the Wintertodt. This was over a thousand years ago and they still stand today.
textByHashes.0c8da62566e1ab0e367a812fd5f2fb4b3dceeb2c: Dinh was the greatest smith that the world has ever seen. I am the finest smith around today and even I cannot match his abilities.
textByHashes.f2d96390f46a4d0f0f68d0392616ba2ad5bfe7cd: The name's Undor. You'll struggle to find a dwarf in this land who knows more about metalwork than me.
textByHashes.36649b55bbfddfe96c69abc00f8ac17e9c31a744: One day I hope to be as good as the legendary Dinh himself.
textByHashes.e312674ac813bf1ff230e6a5e8fb077370d3ba73: They say the doors are failing and the Wintertodt is trying to escape. I'm here to prove to them that the Doors are fine.
textByHashes.c4ff456623977bc48bdc7a43561e117da145e180: Of course they are! They were made by Dinh himself.
textByHashes.ee383ebc4a5018536c12c89da99e8a68cf009823: I'm just here to keep an eye on things. Even though the Doors are fixed now, it will take many years for things to get back to normal.
